_: uetkx-formatter-cases.json — golden corpus for the .uetkx formatter (D-22 contract mechanism). Run by BOTH the C++ automation suite (ReactiveUI.Uetkx.Formatter) and the lsp-server TS port's node --test (Phase 5); byte-identical output required. `fellBack: true` cases must return the input VERBATIM. Every non-fellback case is also an idempotence pin: format(expect) == expect. Default options: printWidth 100, indentStyle tab, singleAttributePerLine false, insertSpaceBeforeSelfClose true.

cases.name: setup re-anchors depth-based; authored blank line before return kept
attributes wrap one-per-line past printWidth
include-only preamble canonicalizes to one include per line + one blank
preamble with a comment is preserved byte-for-byte (never delete user content)
@if/@elif/@else: keyword spacing, joined braces, exploded returns
@match: cases and default at one level in, exploded returns
parse error returns the source verbatim with fellBack
trailing content after the component body falls back verbatim (one component per file)
mixed-decl: two components format (one component per file is a LINT convention, not an error)
named Fragment keeps the author's spelling and attrs
directive body: lead statements keep whole-body geometry before the return
markup comments verbatim; expr nodes get canonical brace spacing
support files (hook/module) round-trip verbatim without fallback
M11: import + export component is already canonical (idempotent)
M11: preamble canonicalizes to #include block, blank, import block, blank
